name: Share a wire capture

## System

- Inverter model + firmware:
- Battery model + firmware:
- Number of packs in stack:
- Approximate install date / age:

## Capture conditions

(what was happening during the capture: idle, charge, discharge, fault, balancing, etc.)

- Approximate SoC range:
- Approximate current range (A):
- Duration:
- Anything unusual on the wire (errors, no-response gaps, slow polling)?

## Privacy confirmation

- [ ] Capture has been processed through `tools/redact.py` against my real serials and IPs.
- [ ] I have inspected the redacted output and confirmed no private identifiers remain.
- [ ] I'm OK with this capture being included in the public repository.

## File

(attach the redacted capture file, or link to a gist / paste)
